5.response: {"Q0":"Yes, but only once because I forgot. The rest of the times after the blue astronaut left the blue planet, I didn't respond when the blue planet appeared."}

11.response: {"Q0":"It examines attention, awareness, concentration, resisting the urge to click on buttons when told I wouldn't gain any gems of a certain color, processing speed, ability to click within the set amount of time."}

0.response: {"Q0":"At the beginning when I was learning the sequence of actions, I kept repeating each set of actions until I had them memorized. I simply had to make myself not respond when the yellow planet appeared. When the blue astronaut left the blue planet, I had to make myself not respond when the blue planet appeared. "}

7.response: {"Q0":"I didn't respond when the blue or yellow planets appeared, so I wasn't motivated to search for blue gems. However, I was always motivated to search for red gems because the red astronaut never left the blue planet and they were the only gems I could collect and sell after the blue astronaut left the blue planet."}

9.response: {"Q0":"I loved visiting the planets because collecting red and blue gems (before the blue astronaut left the blue planet) were the best way of earning money. The selecting of galaxies was more of a gamble, timing, and attention."}

8.response: {"Q0":"I tried to choose the galaxy that had the bigger chance of winning the bigger amount. "}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes. In my game, it was the blue astronaut leaving the blue planet. I was told I would not be able to sell any blue gems."}
